mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_returns ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, order_number, order_total_value, order_delivery_date, customer_id, seller_id, product_id, reason, return_type, total_refund_amount, restocking_fee, description, reviewer_id, review_notes, rejection_reason, warehouse_id, condition_on_receipt, inspector_id, inspector_notes, state_id, flow_id, created_time ) SELECT rr.id, rr.tenant, NOW(), rr.order_id, COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), COALESCE(rr.order_total_value, o.total_amount, 0), rr.order_delivery_date, rr.customer_id, COALESCE(rr.seller_id, ''), rr.product_id, rr.reason, rr.return_type, COALESCE(rr.total_refund_amount, 0), COALESCE(rr.restocking_fee, 0), rr.description, rr.reviewer_id, rr.review_notes, rr.rejection_reason, rr.warehouse_id, rr.condition_on_receipt, rr.inspector_id, rr.inspector_notes, rr.state_id, rr.flow_id, rr.created_time FROM hm_returnrequest.returnrequest rr LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON rr.order_id = o.id
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_customer (customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, last_synced_at) SELECT u.id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), NOW() FROM hm_user.user_profiles u WHERE u.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM hm_returnrequest.returnrequest WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL) ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name, customer_email = EXCLUDED.customer_email, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_seller (seller_id, seller_name, seller_tier, last_synced_at) SELECT s.id, COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), COALESCE(s.tier, ''), NOW() FROM hm_supplier.supplier s WHERE s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT seller_id FROM hm_returnrequest.returnrequest WHERE seller_id IS NOT NULL) ON CONFLICT (seller_id) DO UPDATE SET seller_name = EXCLUDED.seller_name, seller_tier = EXCLUDED.seller_tier, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_product (product_id, product_name, sku, brand, category_name, last_synced_at) SELECT p.id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(p.sku, ''), COALESCE(p.brand, ''), COALESCE(p.category_name, ''), NOW() FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM hm_returnrequest.returnrequest WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL) ON CONFLICT (product_id) DO UPDATE SET product_name = EXCLUDED.product_name, sku = EXCLUDED.sku, brand = EXCLUDED.brand, category_name = EXCLUDED.category_name, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
